variant: give me an 8-week minoxidil timeline, week by week

request.message: give me an 8-week minoxidil timeline, week by week

response_body.response: don't see a week-by-week minoxidil timeline in your current docs. the evidence just says "results take several months of consistency" but doesn't break down what to expect each week. here's what i can tell you from the protocol: minoxidil improves blood flow to follicles, stimulates growth, increases thickness, and slows loss. you'd apply topical (liquid or foam) consistently, and microneedling can boost absorption if you stack it. but the specific week-by-week progression, shedding phases, and when you'd see density changes aren't in your hairmax material. want me to pull a general minoxidil timeline from standard protocols, or do you have other questions about the stack itself.

products.name: Kirkland Signature 5% Minoxidil Solution (6-month)
products.description: Generic 5% minoxidil liquid — same active as Rogaine, lower cost.
